seo.title: Tanning Salon Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your tanning salon. Route unhappy clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Tanning Salons
hero.subheading: Color develops after clients leave. ReviewFlo asks the next day when they see the tone they wanted.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Tanning Salon Faces

items.heading: Results show up hours later
items.body: They walk out unsure and forget to post when it looks right.

items.heading: Orange panic posts spread in stories
items.body: Bad blends become screenshots before you can fix them.

items.heading: Front desk turnover breaks consistency
items.body: Some staff mention reviews, most do not.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Tanning Salons

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Time the ask after color settles
items.body: Send when they text you a happy mirror pic.

items.heading: Private first for burns or streaks
items.body: Solve mishaps before they star you down.

items.heading: Spray and bed businesses
items.body: Same simple link for both services.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when the glow lands and the ask is easy.
Send after standout visits, not every single session.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing without franchise salon pricing.
Follow local rules. Reviews still reflect guardian experiences.
Text after appointments the same as in-studio.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Tanning Salon Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
